The Problem

Your AI Stack Has
No Operating System.

Renting hardware. Routing data through别人的 servers. No OS, no kernel, no app store — just fragile API glue holding it all together.

01

You're Renting Hardware That Costs Twice.

Every month you pay cloud providers to run AI models — and then pay again every time your agents make API calls. It's renting an apartment and paying per light switch. You're locked into two recurring costs for the same thing.

Cloud AI costs 10-30x more than running local models

02

Your Data Goes Through Someone Else's Servers.

Every prompt, every client conversation, every business insight — routed through third-party AI APIs. Your data is their training fuel. Their downtime is your downtime. Their price hike is your problem.

Third-party AI APIs = third-party data access

03

Your AI Stack Has No Operating System.

You have a model, a prompt library, a few scripts, and a Slack channel. That's not a stack — that's glue. Every new agent, every new tool, every new integration adds another fragile API connection. One update breaks everything.

Average business has 14 disconnected AI tools

0x

more expensive than local AI

0+

disconnected AI tools on average

0

data sovereignty with cloud AI

0%

API dependency on third parties

Why ClawOps vs. DIY?

You could build this yourself. But why spend weeks and hundreds of dollars on tools when you could be up and running in 5 minutes?

FeatureDIY / Building It YourselfClawOps
Setup Time2–4 weeks< 5 minutes
Monthly Cost$200–$800+ in API + hosting + toolsStarts at $49/mo, everything included
No-Code SetupRequires developer or technical founderOne-click install, no code needed
Pre-Built IntegrationsBuild each integration from scratchGHL, n8n, Google Workspace + 500+ ready
AI Agents That Actually WorkPrompt engineering, fine-tuning, babysittingRules-based workflows, consistent outputs
Browser AutomationFragile scripts that break on UI updatesAI-native browser control — even without APIs
Ongoing SupportCommunity forums, Stack OverflowDirect support, workflow fixes included
Scale Without HiringHire, onboard, manage more humansAdd agents in seconds, zero HR overhead

Most teams spend $500–$2,000 in API costs and 3–4 weeks building what ClawOps gives you in 5 minutes.

Features

Everything your AI team needs

Purpose-built tools for agencies who are done hiring and ready to automate.

Vertical-Specific AI

Agents trained for your industry — real estate, healthcare, legal, e-commerce — not generic chatbots.

Full Autonomy

Agents make decisions, send emails, update CRMs, and book calls — without human input.

GHL Native

Built natively inside Go High Level. Agents operate inside your existing workflow, not a separate app.

Real-Time Analytics

Track every call, email, and conversion. Know exactly what your AI workforce is doing at all times.

Enterprise Security

SOC 2 compliant. Your data stays yours. End-to-end encryption and private cloud deployment available.

Infinite Scalability

Add 1 agent or 100. Scale your AI workforce up or down based on demand — instantly.

BOOT SEQUENCE

From Signup to Running AI Team
in Under 30 Minutes

No DevOps. No configuration. No terminal. Your agents arrive pre-configured with skills and plugins — ready to work, not ready to be set up.

01

Install Your OS

Point ClawOps at your infrastructure. Our installer handles the rest — kernel, models, agent runtime, and 5,400+ skills & plugins. Your AI OS boots in 30 minutes — pre-configured, not blank.

Powered by OpenClaw's multi-agent runtime

02

Connect Your Apps

Connect GHL, n8n, Google Workspace — like installing apps on a new phone. Each integration unlocks new agent capabilities. No API glue needed.

GHL, n8n, Google Workspace — like an app store

03

Boot Your Agent Team

Pick your vertical. Install the skills & plugins. Your agents wake up and start running — following up with leads, resolving tickets, building reports. On their own. 24/7.

Autonomous 24/7 operation — you only step in when needed

< 30 minutes

From signup to your AI agent team up and running

Autonomous Use Cases

Scale Every Department.
Without Hiring a Single Person.

Every agent runs autonomously — executing tasks, following schedules, and reporting back. Your business grows. Headcount doesn't.

SALES

Autonomous Sales

Your Sales Agent doesn't wait for you. It proactively reaches out to new leads, follows up on stale deals, enriches CRM data, and schedules calls — autonomously. You wake up to a pipeline that's been growing while you slept.

340 leads enriched / week — autonomously
Activate →
SUPPORT

24/7 Support Automation

Your Support Agent handles tickets around the clock — on WhatsApp, Telegram, or Slack. It answers FAQs, routes complex issues, and escalates only what truly needs human judgment. Your response time goes from hours to seconds.

80% tickets resolved without human input
Activate →
RESEARCH

Market Research on Autopilot

Your Research Agent monitors competitors, tracks pricing changes, scrapes market data, and alerts you to opportunities — every day, automatically. Intelligence flows to you before your competitors know what's happening.

Daily intelligence delivered before 8 AM
Activate →
OPS

Operations That Run Themselves

Your Ops Agent pulls data every morning, builds reports, monitors your tools, and flags anomalies — without you asking. You arrive at work with a full brief. The data work is already done.

Daily reports delivered — zero manual work
Activate →

AI DEPARTMENTS

Every Department. Fully Staffed.

Six specialized AI agents. One unified AI OS. Each one trained on your business workflows.

24/7

Research Agent

Deep research, prospect intelligence, market mapping

  • Finds decision-makers
  • Pulls company data
  • Monitors markets
Instant

Support Agent

Handles inbound support, FAQs, and ticket triage

  • Instant responses
  • Frees your team
  • Tracks unresolved issues
Always On

Sales Agent

Nurtures leads, follows up, qualifies prospects

  • Never loses a lead
  • Qualifies around the clock
  • Books calls for you
Multi-Channel

Marketing Agent

Runs outreach, social, and content distribution

  • Multi-channel execution
  • Follows your playbook
  • Reports weekly
Automated

Operations Agent

Manages workflows, approvals, and internal ops

  • Removes bottlenecks
  • Automates approvals
  • Keeps processes clean
Live Data

Analytics Agent

Tracks performance, generates reports, surfaces insights

  • Real-time dashboards
  • Actionable reports
  • No manual data work

APP STORE

500+ Apps. One AI OS.
Zero API Bills.

Connect GHL, n8n, Google Workspace, and 500+ other tools — like installing apps on your phone. Pre-built, pre-authenticated, running on managed infrastructure.

FAQ

Questions, Answered

Chatbots and assistants require you to prompt them for every task. ClawOps workers are preconfigured automation systems — they don't wait for you to ask. They're connected to your tools, run on schedules or triggers, and handle real operational workflows: research pipelines, support queues, content operations, ops tasks. Think digital employees, not chatbots.

Still have questions? Book a free strategy call and we'll walk you through exactly how ClawOps would work for your setup.

Get Started Today

Your competitors are already building their AI workforce.

Stop losing deals to agencies that respond in seconds, not hours. Deploy your first AI agent today — it takes less than 3 minutes.
